positive: Stylized vector graphic of a whimsical hot air balloon basket floating above an abstract, vibrant cityscape silhouette at sunset. The balloon features intricate, clean mandala patterns and botanical motifs, filled with bright jewel-toned colors (cyan, magenta, gold, emerald). The cityscape below is rendered in clean black and deep indigo lines, creating strong negative space contrast. The composition must be highly symmetrical, centered, and designed for seamless tiling or printing on fabric. Overhead view, clean outlines, minimal gradients, modern illustrative style, high contrast, perfect for apparel print.
